concerns
322 GG0130H2_ON_OFF_FTWR_GOAL_CD GG0130H2_ON_OFF_FTWR_GOAL_CD GG0130H2 Discharge Goal Footwear Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for putting on/taking off footwear. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for putting on/taking off footwear. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up assistance
06 = Independent
07 =
